    for Pimple Saudagar Location
    What's great here!
    Pimple Saudagar is a rapidly developing locality in West Pune
    It's a well-connected locality situated right next to Mumbai-Pune Highway
    The locality is also linked via Aundh-Ravet BRTS & Pimple Saudagar roads
    Bhosari Metro Station on the Purple Line (PCMC - Swargate) is 4km away
    Ready 2 BHK apartments make up more than 51% of the inventory
    Most of the housing options are priced in the premium budget range
    Austin Group & P K Group offer under-construction projects here
    ICC Devi Gaurav Technology Park is located about 4 km from the locality
    While Pavana & Akurdi industrial estates also fall within a 9 km
    Westend and Premier Plaza serve as key shopping destinations within 3km
    Proximity to job hubs ensures strong demand from white-collar workers
    Pimpri railway station supports suburban rail connectivity
    PMPML services and Nashik Phata–Wakad BRTS improve public transport access
    GK Gurukul and VIBGYOR Roots schools are located within 5km
    Lotus Multispeciality and Maxcare hospitals ensure healthcare access

    Vehicle owners face difficulty due to lack of parking space
    Key squares of Pimpri Saudagar face frequent traffic congestions
    Pimple Saudagar residents complain about inadequate water supply
    Open garbage dumping and burning have been reported here

    Buying an apartment in Pimple Saudagar: Property market insights

    Pimple Saudagar is one of the popular localities in the city to buy an apartment in Pune West. Some of the popular societies for buying an apartment in Pimple Saudagar are Rose Icon, Vantage Twenty One and P K Hillcrest. These are the most preferred societies in Pimple Saudagar, known for their livability, quality and location. Around 332 apartments are available for sale out of which 306 apartments are ready to move while 25 apartments are currently under-construction. Homebuyers can also check out other localities, which are comparably similar to Pimple Saudagar. This includes Hinjewadi, Baner and Paud Road.

    How good is Pimple Saudagar in terms of connectivity?

    Pimple Saudagar has several transit points in proximity which ensures its inter-connectivity to nearby areas. Kasarwadi railway station, Sant tukaram nagar metro station, Bus Stand, etc, are crucial for Pimple Saudagar connectivity.

    How is Pimple Saudagar neighborhood?

    As far as social infrastructure is concerned, there are 12 educational institutes near Pimple Saudagar such as GK Gurukul, Wisdom International School, Moze College, Dr. D. Y. Patil Vidyapeeth and Spicer Adventist University etc. For medical needs, some of the nearby hospitals are Shree Shakti Hospital, Shree Sakthi Hospital, etc. For shopping purposes, More Quality Store and City One are the closest malls while nearest market is Aundh Market. Most of the societies in Pimple Saudagar has amenities such as Parking, Power Backup and Lift, etc.
    To read more about the positives and negatives of Pimple Saudagar, see here.

    Price Trends for apartments in Pimple Saudagar

    Currently, the apartment prices in Pimple Saudagar hover around ₹ 9550 per sq ft. That means, the average property price for a regular 2 bhk apartment in Pimple Saudagar costs around ₹ 85.95 lakh, a 3 bhk apartment in Pimple Saudagar costs around ₹ 114.6 lakh and a 1 bhk apartment in Pimple Saudagar costs around ₹ 57.3 lakh.
    If you are an end -user or an investor looking for rental returns, Pimple Saudagar offers 306 ready apartments, which are available on an immediate basis.
    To know more about property rates in Pimple Saudagar, check out our Price Trend section here.

    Frequently Asked Questions
    Q

    ✅ Is Pimple Saudagar a good place to stay?

    Past and present residents have rated this locality 4.4, out of 5. In terms of safety, the locality has been rated 4.3. Most of the people pointed out aspects such as Good Public Transport, Easy Cab/Auto Availability & Good Schools are nearby.
    Q

    ✅ Is public transport available in Pimple Saudagar?

    Yes, Pimple Saudagar is well connected with the following connectivity options-
    1. Sant tukaram nagar metro station: 4.6 KM
    2. Kasarwadi railway station: 3.3 KM
    3. Bus Stand: 4.8 KM
    Q

    ✅ What is the usual rent in Pimple Saudagar?

    Pimple Saudagar rent can vary in the range of ₹ 18.2k - 44.6k per month.
    Q

    ✅ Which educational institutes are situated nearby Pimple Saudagar?

    You can find the following educational institutes nearby Pimple Saudagar:
    Play Group, Pre-Primary: Pumpkin Patch Daycare(4.5KM)
    Schools: GK Gurukul(0.9KM), Wisdom International School(2.6KM) and Laxmibai Nandagude School(3.5KM)
    Q

    ✅ Is there a hospital/clinic around Pimple Saudagar?

    Natasha Nursing Home(0.6KM), Shree Shakti Hospital(1.4KM) and Shree Sakthi Hospital(1.4KM) are some hospital/clinics situated around Pimple Saudagar.
    Q

    ✅ Which are the newly-launched projects in Pimple Saudagar?

    Q

    ✅ What is the average transaction rate in Pimple Saudagar?

    The average transaction rate in Pimple Saudagar is ₹ 12,939 per sq ft. This is based on 2,317 transactions that happened recently in the area.
    Q

    ✅ Are property prices rising in Pimple Saudagar?

    Property prices in Pimple Saudagar changed -1.1% in 1 year & +32.1% in last 5 years. However, there is a scope for price appreciation in this locality due to infrastructural developments here.
    Q

    ✅ What type of properties is primarily available for sale in Pimple Saudagar?

    There are majorly 361+ Flats, more than 2+ Plots, and 42+ House in Pimple Saudagar
    Q

    ✅ What is the approximate cost of property in Pimple Saudagar?

    The approximate cost of 1 BHK property in Pimple Saudagar is ₹ Rs 50L to ₹ 1.2Cr.
    The buying price of 2 BHK property in Pimple Saudagar is ₹ Rs 30L to ₹ 1.5Cr.
    For 3 BHK, buyers need to spend around ₹ Rs 35L to ₹ 3.5Cr.
    4 BHK property pricing is ₹ Rs 1.5Cr to ₹ 4.5Cr in Pimple Saudagar.
